/ Movies / Star Wars: The Chosen One's Endless Grind

Original

Star Wars: The Chosen One's Endless Grind

Movies 25 Chapters 1.2M Views
Author: whitedeath0

4.53 (38 ratings)

＃5 Originals' Power Ranking
Read In Library Add to Library
Report story
About Table of Contents

Synopsis

A lifelong Star Wars fan dies in a freak electrical accident, only to awaken in a galaxy far, far away...

As Anakin Skywalker.

Reborn two weeks before the events of The Phantom Menace, he finds himself trapped in the body of a nine-year-old slave on Tatooine. Armed with knowledge of the future, a deep understanding of the Star Wars universe, and an unusual gift known as the Infinite Grind System, he now faces a difficult question:

Can the Chosen One escape the fate that awaits him?

Unlike ordinary systems that grant instant power, the Infinite Grind System rewards only effort. Every repaired machine, every hour of meditation, every race survived, and every challenge overcome brings growth. There are no shortcuts. No legendary starter packs. No free strength.

Only endless progress.

As Anakin walks the path of the Jedi, hidden threats gather in the shadows. The Sith continue their centuries-old plans, the Republic edges closer to war, and the future he remembers may begin to change.

Will he become the hero the galaxy needed?

Or will grinding without limits create something far more terrifying than Darth Vader?

In a galaxy ruled by destiny, one boy has decided to rewrite it.



this is my another book in the universe of star wars This book will be released when I finish the chapters. I'm writing it myself, without any artificial intelligence support other than the English translation, so the chapters will be released when I finish writing them. I won't rush it because I'm doing it mostly for myself, and I want it to be a good story.

No One 17 and Under Admitted

good concept per usual, if you hiatus in this one i will choke you with my intestines, keep the uploads steady brother

27d
View 7 Replies
LV 15
byTraaq

Really want a good Star Wars FF after so long. Please continue and I will give all my stones. Love the fact he has no cap on learning/growing. Would love to see him eventually make his own ship one day (like a super advanced x-70b phantom), his own force techniques or bring back some old ones like teleportation, battle meditation, force heal, ect. His own battle armor (please not anything bulky, idk why star wars loves their bulky armor so much). As for new stuff, maybe create a type of Fūinjustu and incorporate it in the ship, armor/weapons and droids. Anyway, thats all i can think of off the top of my head. Cant wait to read more!

GooDMorphiin

Хотя фанфиков про Энакина Скайуокера полно, но по-настоящему годных и которых хочется прочитать, не отвлекаясь ни на что, можно пересчитать по пальцам одной руки, первые 2 главы, прочитанные в этом фанфике, имеют шанс быть потенциально именно таким фанфиком! Удиви, автор, сможешь ли ты сделать конфетку или упадешь на полпути.

View 0 Replies
LV 5
Darius_Chromwell

It started out so good, there aren’t really enough Star Wars fanfics on here especially system ones. I like the system it’s simple but effective and I really enjoyed the MC for the first few chapters. But forcing the MC to act like the original anakin when interacting with the other characters is completely ruining it for me. In less than 3 chapters I have completely lost interest in this fanfic just because of that.

Brezer

Raj_Vatsal_5122

its one of the best star wars fanfiction i have read . its progression system is really done beautifully. And i was really absorbed in the story , so much so that before i knew it i had completely read the available chapters in one sitting 👌👌👌

19d
View 1 Replies
LV 4
Naigelton

The story is really good, and it's well written; the system is also well designed. However, the plot feels extremely forced whenever Padmé is involved. You can particularly sense the author's influence over the characters, like a puppet master. Whenever Padmé is around, it's as if we're reading about the original Anakin instead of a reincarnated person. All the discussions and situations they find themselves in feel contrived, making it obvious that the author is trying to set up a future romance between Padmé and Anakin. I really like the Padmé and Anakin dynamic in the original story, but when it involves a reincarnated character who knows how hypocritical and often clueless she is in her decision-making, it becomes frustrating. Anyone who has read even a little about her would recognize that she presents numerous red flags for any romance or relationship; she is trouble. For instance, she might wake up in the middle of the night to infiltrate enemy lines and confront a mafia boss, insisting that slavery is wrong and that the Republic consists of good people. This encounter inevitably leads to a gunfight, where she ends up shooting at them. Then, just a day later, she will preach about how violence is bad. Original Anakin and Padmé are iconic, while the idea of a reincarnated character with Padmé is just unappealing. In this story, it feels forced when Anakin behaves differently around Padmé; it's as if there's a sudden switch in his personality.

8d
View 0 Replies
LV 14
Ninewive

good story . small suggestions tho. remove the growh through and dont get focuse on the calculations or you will get stuck doing math instead of writing story. i saw so many story get dropped when the math get to much. thanks you for writing. 🥰🥰🥰

10d
View 0 Replies
LV 13
Bachingchung

The whole skills & exp bars made the whole thing look so cluttered. The whole thing is just a huge ploy to pad word count. What's even the point of showing the same skills and exp bars at least 3 times. None of that matters when the level remains the same. Every skill will also have subskills like it's so unneccessary. If MC has a breathing as a skill listed it would look like this. Mouth Breathing: lvl 5 (20/3200) Nose Breathing: lvl 3 (20/400) Inhaling: lvl 6(20/6400) Exhalingv lvl 7(20/12.8k) There's just too much unneccessary shit being listed after every 3 paragraphs.

13d
View 5 Replies
LV 12
MIDO999

Stop using AI to improve chapter formatting. Tell him to translate and correct the grammar, and not to change or add anything to the text. The three or four lines that are supposed to be one paragraph, and the excessive use of the phrase "(for the first time in my life)," give me a headache. But aside from these problems, the story and plot are good.

Demon_god_777

22d
View 0 Replies
LV 4
Sinonthe1st

As of Chapter 25, a solid 5 out of 5 stars for a fanfic. I must say, I am impressed as of now, after reading many comments of other Novels of the Author, where it was said he uses Ai etc. I was slightly sceptical, it also didn't help much that the other Novels haven't had an update in Months. But I need to say this is definitely one of the best Starwars Novels I have read up to now, I am also unable to see how Ai should have been used. The Mc and other People in the story feel alive and not just random passersby, The system is well implemented and I also like mcs Personality as of now. The only thing I am not a big fan of is how much he disliked slavery, when he first went outside his house. While I get it as a modern person and he also said that he doesn't have the ability to help them now, I really don't hope of future scenes where he becomes some form of Human rights activist, afterall this is Starwars not Earth, they managed to work with their current systems for very long, and while he might be able to change 1 or 2 planets if he goes all out, changing the whole galaxy is seriously unrealistic. But nothing of that is confirmed and more a slight fear of me, since many novels go down the road of changing the law of the world to resemble the law of their past lives, since it is so much better and full of justice etc.(while seriously our own lawsystem is still slavery just different, and that is in the richer countries, let alone the poor ones) Until now I do not regret reading this Novel, a really great work Author, please just don't drop it.

Humanbutnotworthit

By far, one of the best Star Wars fanfiction I’ve ever read keep up the good work
